from core.engine import ME17Engine
from core.checksum import ChecksumEngine
eng1 = ME17Engine\(\); eng1.load\('ori_300.bin'\)
eng2 = ME17Engine\(\); eng2.load\('npro_stg2_300.bin'\)
cs = ChecksumEngine\(eng1\)
r = cs.verify\(\)
print\('verify OK'\)
d = cs.analyze_boot_diff\(eng2\)
print\(f'BOOT diff: {d[\\"total_changed\\"]} bajtova, {len\(d[\\"blocks\\"]\)} blokova'\)
print\(f'CODE CRC ORI:  {d[\\"code_crc_ori\\"]}'\)
print\(f'CODE CRC STG2: {d[\\"code_crc_stg2\\"]}'\)
print\(f'CRC pronadjen u BOOT-u: {d[\\"crc_in_boot\\"]}'\)
for b in d['blocks']:
    print\(f'  0x{b[\\"offset\\"]:06X}  {b[\\"size\\"]}B  ORI:{b[\\"val_ori\\"]}  STG2:{b[\\"val_stg2\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\SeaDoo\\Desktop\\me_suite" && python -c "
from core.engine import ME17Engine
from core.checksum import ChecksumEngine
eng1 = ME17Engine\(\); eng1.load\('ori_300.bin'\)
eng2 = ME17Engine\(\); eng2.load\('npro_stg2_300.bin'\)
cs = ChecksumEngine\(eng1\)
d = cs.analyze_boot_diff\(eng2\)
print\(f'BOOT diff: {d[\\"total_changed\\"]} bajtova, {len\(d[\\"blocks\\"]\)} blokova'\)
print\(f'CODE CRC ORI:  {d[\\"code_crc_ori\\"]}'\)
print\(f'CODE CRC STG2: {d[\\"code_crc_stg2\\"]}'\)
print\(f'CRC pronadjen u BOOT: {d[\\"crc_in_boot\\"]}'\)
for b in d['blocks']:
    print\(f'  0x{b[\\"offset\\"]:06X}  {b[\\"size\\"]}B  ORI:{b[\\"val_ori\\"]}  STG2:{b[\\"val_stg2\\"]}'\)

print\(\)
hits = cs.try_crc_match\(\)
print\(f'CRC match pokusaj: {len\(hits\)} pogodaka'\)
for h in hits:
    print\(f'  {h}'\)
" 2>&1)
